guide: a photo of a teacher guiding a student
answer: a photo of a teacher answering a student's question
On-stage interaction: a photo of a teacher interacting with students on stage
blackboard-writing: a photo of a teacher writing on the blackboard
teacher: a photo of a teacher lecturing
stand: a photo of a teacher standing still
screen: a photo of a teacher pointing at a projection screen
blackBoard: a photo of a teacher pointing at the blackboard

hand-raise: a photo of a student raising their hand
read: a photo of a student reading a book
write: a photo of a student writing in a notebook

bow-head: a photo of a student with their head bowed down
turn-head: a photo of a student turning their head sideways
